features.claim: Antigravity provides unlimited Tab completions to all plan tiers.
features.name: Tab completions

features.claim: Scheduled Tasks is a product feature accessible to all Antigravity users.
features.name: Scheduled Tasks

features.claim: A command-line interface (CLI) is included as a product feature available to all Antigravity users.
features.name: CLI

features.claim: Users on Google AI Ultra can use third-party models in addition to Gemini models.
features.name: Access to third-party models
subfeatures: AI Credit Overages: a user setting controls whether purchased AI credits are automatically consumed when the baseline quota is exhausted
